items.headline: AT&T (T) Stock Could Be 23.7% Undervalued After CFO Succession News
items.summary: AT&T (T) is back in focus after the company announced a planned change in its finance leadership, with long serving Chief Financial Officer Pascal Desroches set to retire and Jennifer Biry lined up as his successor. items.headline: AT&T (T) Names Jennifer Biry As Future CFO After Pascal Desroches Retirement
items.summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) announced a CFO succession plan, with Jennifer Biry set to become Chief Financial Officer after Pascal Desroches retires at the end of 2026. Biry is expected to return to AT&T as Deputy CFO in 2026 before assuming the CFO role in 2027. The transition involves an executive who previously held senior roles at AT&T and most recently served in leadership at McAfee. For investors following AT&T, this planned CFO transition sits against the backdrop of a telecom sector focused on...
